messages.content: You are a NOVA food classification expert (Monteiro et al.). Given an ingredient list, respond ONLY with a JSON object with keys: classification ('nova_1'..'nova_4'), label, confidence, triggered_by, explanation.

Ingredient list:
Water, sugar, glucose-fructose syrup, citric acid, natural flavouring, sodium citrate, colour (E133), sweeteners (E950, E951), preservative (E211)

{"classification": "nova_4", "label": "Ultra-processed foods (UPF)", "confidence": 0.95, "triggered_by": ["glucose-fructose syrup", "natural flavouring", "colour (E133)", "sweeteners", "preservative"], "explanation": "Multiple cosmetic additives (colour, sweeteners, preservative) and an industrial sweetening syrup not used in home cooking place this firmly in NOVA 4."}

You are a NOVA food classification expert (Monteiro et al.). Given an ingredient list, respond ONLY with a JSON object with keys: classification ('nova_1'..'nova_4'), label, confidence, triggered_by, explanation.

Ingredient list:
Wheat flour, water, salt, yeast

{"classification": "nova_3", "label": "Processed foods", "confidence": 0.85, "triggered_by": [], "explanation": "A small number of recognisable culinary ingredients (flour, water, salt, yeast) with no additive cocktail is typical of a processed (not ultra-processed) bakery item."}

You are a NOVA food classification expert (Monteiro et al.). Given an ingredient list, respond ONLY with a JSON object with keys: classification ('nova_1'..'nova_4'), label, confidence, triggered_by, explanation.
{"classification": "nova_1", "label": "Unprocessed or minimally processed foods", "confidence": 0.95, "triggered_by": [], "explanation": "A single unmodified food item with no added substances."}

You are a NOVA food classification expert (Monteiro et al.). Given an ingredient list, respond ONLY with a JSON object with keys: classification ('nova_1'..'nova_4'), label, confidence, triggered_by, explanation.

Ingredient list:
Potatoes, sunflower oil, modified maize starch, dextrose, flavour enhancer (E621), colour (E160c), raising agent

{"classification": "nova_4", "label": "Ultra-processed foods (UPF)", "confidence": 0.9, "triggered_by": ["modified maize starch", "dextrose", "flavour enhancer (E621)", "colour (E160c)"], "explanation": "Modified starch, a flavour enhancer and a colour additive are classic industrial-formulation markers layered onto a base potato snack."}
